title: Phase 2: OpenClaw Integration — Completion Plan
summary: Archived retrospective of the Phase 2 OpenClaw Gateway integration plan — what was scoped, implemented, tested, and shipped.
notes: Archived phase-completion retrospective under docs/retrospectives/. Contains planning/implementation history (tasks, test plan, review outcomes) rather than a single locked decision, user-facing requirements, or an API/schema contract — classified as DOC (context only). Referenced tasks have already shipped per context provided.
